releases.author: asyouplz
releases.description:
## 🐛 Bug Fixes

- Fixed sentence case violations in UI text per ObsidianReviewBot feedback (10 fixes across 5 files)
- Fixed unsafe any assignment in ProviderSettingsContainer.ts
- Fixed OpenAI brand name capitalization
- Fixed type safety issues in SettingsTypes.ts
- Fixed enum comparison issues in DeepgramLogger.ts

## 📝 Changes

**Files Modified:**
- SettingsTab.ts: UI text improvements
- EnhancedSettingsTab.ts: Sentence case fixes
- ProviderSettingsContainer.ts: Type safety + sentence case
- FormatOptions.ts: Dropdown option labels
- main.ts: Notice messages

Related to: obsidianmd/obsidian-releases#8004
releases.name: Release v3.0.14

releases.author: asyouplz
releases.description:
## Changes
- replace inline style assignments with CSS custom properties across progress/notification UI
- remove remaining innerHTML usage per ObsidianReviewBot feedback
- bump plugin to v3.0.3; lint/typecheck/build passing

releases.author: asyouplz
releases.description:
## 🔧 ObsidianReviewBot Required Changes

This release addresses the Required items from ObsidianReviewBot review for community plugin submission.

### Changes Made

#### Inline Styles → CSS Classes
- ✅ Moved pulse loader animation delays to CSS classes (`pulse-dot--1/2/3`)
- ✅ Moved skeleton loader height/spacing options to CSS modifier classes
- ✅ Moved chart bar styles to CSS classes (`chart-bar--whisper/deepgram`)
- ✅ Moved notice button layout to CSS classes (`notice-action-row`)

#### Build Verification
- Bundle size: **149KB** (within 150KB target)
- Removed prohibited patterns from main.js:
  * `.style.` usage: **0 instances** ✅
  * `innerHTML`: **0 instances** ✅
  * `console.log`: **0 instances** ✅ (removed by build process)

### Technical Details

All inline styles have been refactored to use CSS classes following BEM methodology, making the plugin more theme-friendly and easier to customize.

**Note**: A small number (4) of dynamic width calculations remain in AdvancedSettingsPanel as they require runtime percentage calculations based on user settings.

### Related

- PR: obsidianmd/obsidian-releases#8004
- Review requirements: https://github.com/obsidianmd/obsidian-releases/pull/8004#issuecomment-3358965336

---

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
releases.name: v3.0.2 - ObsidianReviewBot Required Changes

releases.author: asyouplz
releases.description:
## 🚀 First Public Release

Speech-to-Text plugin for Obsidian with multi-provider support and speaker diarization.

### ✨ Key Features
- 🎙️ **Multi-Provider Support**: OpenAI Whisper & Deepgram
- 🎭 **Speaker Diarization**: Automatic speaker identification
- 🌐 **40+ Languages**: Auto-detection and multi-language support
- 📝 **Smart Text Insertion**: Flexible insertion options
- ⚡ **High Performance**: 98% accuracy with Nova-3 model

### 📦 Installation
1. Download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, `styles.css`
2. Place in `.obsidian/plugins/speech-to-text/`
3. Enable in Obsidian settings

### 🔑 Requirements
- Obsidian v0.15.0+
- OpenAI or Deepgram API key

For full documentation, see [README](https://github.com/asyouplz/SpeechNote#readme)
releases.name: v3.0.1 - Public Launch
